title.en: GENERIC PACKAGES, INTERCONNECTIONS, CONNECTORS OR OTHER CONSTRUCTIONAL DETAILS OF DEVICES COVERED BY CLASS H10
Constructional details of integrated devices in chips, wafers or substrates
Isolation regions in semiconductor bodies between components of integrated devices
Isolation regions comprising dielectric materials
formed using local oxidation of silicon [LOCOS], e.g. sealed interface localised oxidation [SILO] or side-wall mask isolation [SWAMI]
formed using trench refilling with dielectric materials, e.g. shallow trench isolations
Air gaps
Isolation regions comprising PN junctions
Isolation regions comprising polycrystalline semiconductor materials
Isolation regions based on field-effect
Highly-doped buried regions of integrated devices
Interconnections in chips, wafers or substrates
Interconnections within wafers or substrates, e.g. through-silicon vias [TSV]
Interconnections external to wafers or substrates, e.g. back-end-of-line [BEOL] metallisations or vias connecting to gate electrodes
characterised by their conductive parts
Vias, e.g. via plugs
Layouts of interconnections
Conductive materials thereof
characterised by their insulating parts
comprising air gaps
comprising two or more dielectric layers having different properties, e.g. different dielectric constants
Insulating materials thereof
Adaptable interconnections, e.g. fuses or antifuses
Generic parts of integrated devices, not otherwise provided for
Constructional details related to chips, wafers, substrates or packages
Arrangements for thermal protection or thermal control (integrated devices comprising arrangements for thermal protection H10D0089600000)
Arrangements for heating
Arrangements for cooling
characterised by their shape, e.g. having conical or cylindrical projections
characterised by their materials
comprising Peltier coolers
wherein the packaged device is completely immersed in a fluid other than air, e.g. immersed in a cryogenic fluid
involving heat exchange by flowing fluids
by flowing gases, e.g. forced air cooling
by flowing liquids, e.g. forced water cooling
Arrangements for sensing temperature
Securing means for detachable heating or cooling arrangements, e.g. clamps
Fillings or auxiliary members in containers or in encapsulations for thermal protection or control
for cooling by change of state
Auxiliary members characterised by their shape
Circuit arrangements for thermal protection or control of packages
Arrangements for protection of devices (arrangements for thermal protection H10W0040000000)
protecting against electromagnetic or particle radiation, e.g. light, X-rays, gamma-rays or electrons
against alpha rays, e.g. for outer space applications
protecting against tampering, e.g. unauthorised inspection or reverse engineering
protecting against electrostatic charges or discharges, e.g. Faraday shields  (integrated devices comprising arrangements for electrical protection H10D0089600000)
protecting against overcurrent or overload, e.g. fuses or shunts  (integrated devices comprising arrangements for electrical protection H10D0089600000)
Electrical arrangements for controlling or matching impedance
at high-frequency [HF] or radio frequency [RF]
Marks applied to devices, e.g. for alignment or identification
Aspects of packages
Package substrates; Interposers; Redistribution layers [RDL]
Manufacture or treatment
of conductive package substrates serving as an interconnection, e.g. of metal plates (manufacture or treatment of leadframes H10W0070040000)
of leadframes
of insulating or insulated package substrates, or of interposers, or of redistribution layers (manufacture or treatment of leadframes H10W0070040000)
using temporary auxiliary supports
by depositing layers on the chip or wafer, e.g. "chip-first" RDLs
extending onto an encapsulation that laterally surrounds the chip or wafer, e.g. fan-out wafer level package [FOWLP] RDLs
Conductive package substrates serving as an interconnection, e.g. metal plates (leadframes H10W0070400000)
Leadframes
Insulating or insulated package substrates; Interposers; Redistribution layers  (leadframes H10W0070400000)
characterised by their interconnections
Vias, e.g. via plugs
Shapes or dispositions of interconnections
Cross-sectional shapes
Top-view layouts
Fan-out layouts
Fan-in layouts
Conductive materials thereof
characterised by their insulating layers or insulating parts
Shapes or dispositions thereof
comprising multiple insulating layers
Insulating materials thereof
Ceramics or glasses
Organic materials
Semiconductor materials that are electrically insulating, e.g. undoped silicon
Interconnections or connectors in packages
Bump connectors, e.g. solder bumps or copper pillars; Dummy bumps; Thermal bumps
Bond pads specially adapted therefor
Die-attach connectors
Anisotropic conductive adhesives
Bond pads specially adapted therefor
Bond wires
Bond pads specially adapted therefor
Strap connectors, e.g. thick copper clips for grounding of power devices
Bond pads, in general
Encapsulations, e.g. protective coatings
Manufacture or treatment
characterised by their shape or disposition
on active surfaces of flip-chip devices, e.g. underfills
characterised by their materials
comprising oxides, nitrides or carbides, e.g. ceramics or glasses
comprising organic materials, e.g. plastics or resins
Containers; Fillings or auxiliary members therefor; Seals
Manufacture or treatment
Providing fillings in containers, e.g. gas filling
Containers or parts thereof
characterised by their shape
Containers comprising a conductive base serving as an interconnection
having other interconnections through an insulated passage in the conductive base
having other interconnections parallel to the conductive base
having other interconnections perpendicular to the conductive base
having another interconnection being formed by a cover plate parallel to the conductive base, e.g. sandwich type
Containers comprising an insulating or insulated base
having interconnections in passages through the insulating or insulated base
having interconnections parallel to the insulating or insulated base
characterised by their materials
Insulating materials, e.g. resins, glasses or ceramics
Fillings or auxiliary members in containers, e.g. centering rings  (fillings or auxiliary members for thermal protection or control in containers or encapsulations H10W0040700000)
Fillings
Gaseous fillings
Liquid fillings
Solid or gel fillings
Fillings including materials for absorbing or reacting with moisture or other undesired substances
Seals
characterised by their shape or disposition, e.g. between cap and walls of a container
characterised by their materials
Detachable holders for supporting packaged chips in operation
Direct bonding of chips, wafers or substrates
Package configurations
Configurations of laterally-adjacent chips
the laterally-adjacent chips having different thicknesses than each other
Configurations of stacked chips
the stacked chips being on both top and bottom sides of a package substrate, interposer or RDL
at least one of the stacked chips being laterally offset from a neighbouring stacked chip, e.g. chip stacks having a staircase shape
the stacked chips being of the same size without any chips being laterally offset, e.g. chip stacks having a rectangular shape
the stacked chips having different sizes, e.g. chip stacks having a pyramidal shape
Packaging processes not covered by the other groups of this subclass
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
